creator: Alda, Alan, 1936-
Thomas, Marlo
Ms. Foundation for Education and Communication

description: Intended audience: Ages 15 through college and adult

Hosts Alan Alda and Marlo Thomas trace the evolution of the roles and lives of women in the twentieth century. Includes newsreel footage, stills, radio and television footage, cartoons, and period music
subject: Women
title: She's Nobody's Baby: A History of American Women in the 20th Century
